= bitwise_or

Performs a bitwise OR operation between the integer and the specified value.


== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `value`
| `integer`
| The value to OR with

|===


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = this.value.bitwise_or(6)

# In:  {"value":12}
# Out: {"new_value":14}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.combined = this.flags.bitwise_or(8)

# In:  {"flags":4}
# Out: {"combined":12}
----
